organizations: Emergency shelter, humanitarian transport, displacement assistance, protection services, logistics support, and recovery assistance for people affected by the Venezuela earthquakes.

organizations.name: UNHCR
organizations.supportType: Emergency protection, shelter, core relief items, and support for refugees, displaced families, asylum-seekers, returnees, and other vulnerable people affected by the Venezuela earthquakes.

organizations.name: IFRC / Venezuelan Red Cross
organizations.supportType: Search and rescue, emergency relief, assistance to injured people, humanitarian cargo, support to Venezuelan Red Cross operations.

organizations.name: Direct Relief
organizations.supportType: Emergency medical aid, wound care, surgical supplies, antibiotics, field medic packs, and support for search and rescue teams.

organizations.name: International Rescue Committee
organizations.supportType: Health, nutrition, WASH, protection, education, food security, livelihoods, and emergency supplies.

organizations.name: World Central Kitchen
organizations.supportType: Food relief and meals for impacted families through local partners.

organizations.name: Malteser International
organizations.supportType: Immediate emergency assistance and rapid relief measures in affected areas.
